arts.ttl: Player ‘looks set to stay’ at Blackburn Rovers – Snubs 3 clubs, and wants Rovers future
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers’ Arnór Sigurðsson has less than six months left on his contract and his long-term future at Ewood Park remains uncertain. According to Sweden’s Fotbollskanalen, Djurgården, IFK Norrköping and Malmö FF are all looking to sign the winger in the winter market. arts.ttl: Sam Long ‘touch and go’ – which could lead to decision on Stephan Negru
arts.sum: SAM Long is ‘touch and go’ to be available for Oxford United this weekend – which could lead to a decision being made on Stephan Negru.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers boss hit with FA charge for Leeds United 'bias' remarks after Elland Road drama
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers head coach John Eustace has been slapped with a misconduct charge by the Football Association following remarks suggesting bias from referee Oliver Langford in the Championship clash at Leeds on New Year’s Day.
